further_reading.title: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides a general framework for assessing AI risk, reliability, and appropriate governance before acting on model output.

further_reading.title: NIST Generative AI Profile
further_reading.why_relevant: Extends the AI RMF with generative-AI-specific risks and practical guidance around evaluation, verification, and human oversight.

further_reading.title: OWASP LLM09:2025 Misinformation
further_reading.why_relevant: Explains why LLM misinformation and overreliance are operational risks, reinforcing the module's verification-first habit.

notes: This module is primarily pedagogical and workflow-oriented. It contains no concrete external factual claims, named incidents, statistics, standards references in body text, or vendor/version assertions that require inline citations under the current rubric.
